title: Murder case at Mangaluru North PS
narrative: On 2024-04-10, a case of murder was reported at Mangaluru North PS, Mangaluru district. Homicide at Hosur Road. Victim (male, 20) found with stab wounds. Dispute over money suspected as motive. The investigating team identified 2 suspect(s): Ravi Murthy, Shivaraj Bhat. The modus operandi observed was: Pre-planned attack using sharp weapons in isolated locations. The case was registered under the relevant sections of the IPC and BNS. Investigation revealed connections to 1 prior cases in the Mangaluru area. The case has been resolved and chargesheeted.
modus_operandi: Pre-planned attack using sharp weapons in isolated locations
evidence_summary: 1. FIR registered at Mangaluru North PS. 2. 5 witness statements collected. 3. Mobile CDR obtained. 4. Scene of crime inspected
investigating_officer: Inspector Rajesh Desai, Mangaluru North PS
